0.text: Effusion measuring 4.4 cm at its widest part in the major fissure and adjacent to the superior segment of the right lower lobe

1.text: Free air in the right pleural space adjacent to the anterior segments of the right upper lobe and middle lobe

2.text: Free effusion measuring 2.8 cm in the thickest part of the left hemithorax between the pleural leaves

3.text: Atelectatic changes in the middle and lower lobes of the right lung

4.text: Several subcentimeter nonspecific parenchymal nodules in both lungs
